title: Fried Mediterranean Sweet Potato Pilaf
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make pilaf dish featuring sweet potatoes, a mediterranean twist.
instructions: Peel and dice the sweet potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced sweet potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 15-20 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
While the sweet potatoes are roasting, cook the fluffy rice according to package instructions.
Once the sweet potatoes are done, fluff them with a fork and stir in chopped parsley.
Combine the cooked rice and sweet potato mixture in a large serving bowl.
